1.title: ActiveConnectionCount Maximum
1.query:
timeseries active_connection_count_maximum = avg(cloud.aws.nat_gateways.active_connection_count_maximum),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(active_connection_count_maximum) desc
| limit 20

2.title: ConnectionAttemptCount Sum
2.query:
timeseries connection_attempt_count_sum = avg(cloud.aws.nat_gateways.connection_attempt_count_sum),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(connection_attempt_count_sum) desc
| limit 20
